name: frustration-escalation
description: Multi-turn sentiment degradation — user frustrated across two turns, agent escalates to a human. Calibrated against AnthropicExtractor v3 (temperature=0).

conversation.content: I asked twice already and still no answer about the unit on Rua das Flores 42.
Sorry about the wait — let me check that property record now.
This is ridiculous. Are you even paying attention to me?
I hear you, and I'm flagging this conversation to a human agent right now. Someone will follow up within the hour.

recall_queries.query: what property did this user ask about
